suite.name: Online Boutique Tests

test.name: Frontend Home Page Should Be Accessible

kw.name: Open Browser

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

test.doc: Verify the frontend is up and displays the product list.

test.name: Product Details Page Load

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.doc: Verify clicking a product displays the details page.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.46) Stacktrace: #0 0x560212e4dd0a <unknown> #1 0x56021285d682 <unknown> #2 0x56021285440a <unknown> #3 0x5602128450c1 <unknown> #4 0x560212846ebc <unknown> #5 0x5602128455b9 <unknown> #6 0x560212844ca5 <unknown> #7 0x560212844856 <unknown> #8 0x56021284237b <unknown> #9 0x560212842bc0 <unknown> #10 0x56021286105d <unknown> #11 0x5602128fbcbb <unknown> #12 0x5602128fb04b <unknown> #13 0x5602128a488f <unknown> #14 0x5602128a5651 <unknown> #15 0x560212e12159 <unknown> #16 0x560212e15061 <unknown> #17 0x560212dfe919 <unknown> #18 0x560212e15c2e <unknown> #19 0x560212de4c90 <unknown> #20 0x560212e3a358 <unknown> #21 0x560212e3a528 <unknown> #22 0x560212e4c353 <unknown> #23 0x7fc7e31a6ac3 <unknown>

test.name: Service Health Check (API)

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=frontend, url=http://localhost:8080, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /_healthz

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /_healthz

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /_healthz

ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /_healthz (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.status: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /_healthz (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Ping the frontend health check endpoint.
test.status: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /_healthz (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))

suite.doc: Smoke tests for Google Microservices Demo (Online Boutique)

errors.msg: Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /_healthz
